philosophy: A luxury home isn't won in the last 10%—it's won in planning, documentation, and daily site control.
hero_subtext: Luxury custom homes in Toronto, delivered with permit-ready planning and meticulous finish control. Decisions are documented early, timelines are tracked by milestones, and finish quality is managed through on-site standards from framing through final walkthrough.

services.title: Permit-Ready Planning
services.description: Feasibility review, zoning checks, and permit planning. Approvals are coordinated early to reduce delays and protect the timeline.

services.title: Scope Control & Coordination
services.description: Design-build coordination with clear scope, specs, and selections. Change orders are strictly tracked with price and schedule impact.

services.title: Milestone Quality Control
services.description: Standards enforced at framing, mechanical, envelope, insulation, and finishes. Inspections happen at the stages that matter most.

cta: Build Your Toronto Dream Home Today
